name: Gwajin Rashin Ruwa
description: Kimanta filin don rashin ruwa da tsananin rashin lafiya. Launin fitsari shine mafi yawan alamar filin aiki. Yi la'akari da halin tunani a matsayin alamar rashin ruwa mai tsanani yana ci gaba zuwa bugun jini.
instructions: Bincika launin fitsari, turgor fata, yanayin tunani, da alamun mahimmanci. Fitsari mai duhu, busassun mucous membranes, da tachycardia suna nuna rashin ruwa mai mahimmanci da ke buƙatar rehydration mai aiki.

categories.label: To Mai Ruwa
categories.description: Kodan rawaya don share fitsari. Ba a buƙatar sa baki.

categories.label: Karancin Rashin Ruwa
categories.description: Fitsari mai launin rawaya, ƙishirwa. Rehydration na baka. Ƙarfafa 250-500 ml na ruwa a kowace awa.

categories.label: Matsakaici-Mai Tsananin Rashin Ruwa
categories.description: Fitsari amber, HR dagawa, turgor fata ya ragu, bushe baki. Ruwan IV/IO idan ba a yarda da baki ba. 1-2L LR ko NS.

categories.label: Hatsari -- Zafi Zafi / Mai tsanani
categories.description: Mafi ƙarancin fitowar fitsari, canjin LOC, bushewar fata mai zafi. Gaggawa na likita -- saurin sanyaya + ruwaye na IV + MEDEVAC.

pediatric.note: Yara suna bushewa da sauri fiye da manya. Sunken fontanelle (jarirai), hawayen da ba a nan, da gajiyawa alamu ne masu mahimmanci. IV tushen nauyi: 20 ml/kg LR bolus.

obstetric.note: Mata masu ciki suna buƙatar ƙara yawan ruwa. Rashin ruwa na iya haifar da maƙarƙashiya. Mummunan sake shan ruwa na baki na farko; IV idan ba jure wa baka ba.

source: PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine / US Army Hot Weather Ops
